ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "ms_subclass" INTEGER /* Type of dwelling involved in the sale */,
  "ms_zoning" TEXT /* General zoning classification of the sale */,
  "lot_area" INTEGER /* Lot size in square feet */,
  "lot_config" TEXT /* Type of lot */,
  "overall_qual" INTEGER /* Overall quality of the property */,
  "overall_cond" INTEGER /* Overall condition of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Original construction date */,
  "year_remod_add" INTEGER /* Remodel date */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family, townhouse) */,
  "total_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of bathrooms */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms */,
  "garage_type" TEXT /* Type of garage (e.g., attached, detached) */,
  "pool_type" TEXT /* Type of pool (e.g., in-ground, above-ground) */,
  "fireplaces" INTEGER /* Number of fireplaces */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system (e.g., gas, electric) */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system (e.g., central, window) */,
  "roof_material" TEXT /* Material of the roof (e.g., shingle, tile) */,
  "exterior_material" TEXT /* Material of the exterior (e.g., brick, vinyl) */,
  "foundation_type" TEXT /* Type of foundation (e.g., poured concrete, block) */,
  "basement_type" TEXT /* Type of basement (e.g., full, partial, none) */,
  "central_air" INTEGER /* Whether the property has central air conditioning */,
  "deck" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a deck */,
  "porch" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a porch */,
  "fence" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a fence */,
  "zoning_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the zoning classification */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Additional description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interiors" (
  "interior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interior feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the interior feature belongs to */,
  "bsmt_fin_sf1" INTEGER /* Type 1 finished square feet of basement area */,
  "bsmt_fin_sf2" INTEGER /* Type 2 finished square feet of basement area */,
  "bsmt_unf_sf" INTEGER /* Unfinished square feet of basement area */,
  "total_bsmt_sf" INTEGER /* Total square feet of basement area */,
  "1st_flr_sf" INTEGER /* First floor square feet */,
  "2nd_flr_sf" INTEGER /* Second floor square feet */,
  "low_qual_fin_sf" INTEGER /* Low quality finished square feet */,
  "gr_liv_area" INTEGER /* Above grade (ground) living area square feet */,
  "basement_finish" TEXT /* Description of the basement finish */,
  "basement_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the basement */,
  "interior_features" TEXT /* Additional interior features */,
  "fireplace_description" TEXT /* Description of the fireplace(s) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interiors_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exteriors" (
  "exterior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exterior feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the exterior feature belongs to */,
  "bedroom_abv_gr" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms above grade */,
  "tot_rms_abv_grd" INTEGER /* Total rooms above grade (does not include bathrooms) */,
  "garage_cars" INTEGER /* Number of cars the garage can hold */,
  "garage_area" INTEGER /* Size of garage in square feet */,
  "wood_deck_sf" INTEGER /* Wood deck size in square feet */,
  "open_porch_sf" INTEGER /* Open porch size in square feet */,
  "enclosed_porch" INTEGER /* Enclosed porch size in square feet */,
  "3ssn_porch" INTEGER /* 3-season porch size in square feet */,
  "screen_porch" INTEGER /* Screened-in porch size in square feet */,
  "exterior_features" TEXT /* Additional exterior features */,
  "garage_description" TEXT /* Description of the garage */,
  "landscape_features" TEXT /* Description of the landscaping */,
  "parking_type" TEXT /* Type of parking (e.g., driveway, street) */,
  "parking_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exterior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exteriors_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Sale price of the property */,
  "mo_sold" INTEGER /* Month the property was sold */,
  "yr_sold" INTEGER /* Year the property was sold */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the real estate agent */,
  "sale_description" TEXT /* Additional description of the sale */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pools" (
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pool */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the pool belongs to */,
  "pool_area" INTEGER /* Pool area in square feet */,
  "misc_val" INTEGER /* Miscellaneous value of the pool */,
  "pool_features" TEXT /* Additional features of the pool */,
  "pool_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the pool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pools_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, buyer) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuations" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being valued */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the valuation */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date when the valuation was performed */,
  "valuation_amount" INTEGER /* Valuation amount of the property */,
  "valuation_description" TEXT /* Additional description of the valuation */,
  "valuation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the valuation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being predicted */,
  "predicted_price" INTEGER /* Predicted price of the property */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
